The '''neuro-shock hand''', manufactured by [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]], was a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] prosthetic [[Limb/Legends|limb]]. It was equipped with a [[neuro-repulsor field generator]] which delivered a [[neuro-shock]] to any organic being it touched. The hand functioned similarly to a standard prosthetic, and had full sensory response, meaning the user could feel sensations and pain through the hand. The hand was activated when jabbed sharply, although the use was not voluntary, meaning a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] using a neuro-shock hand could injure anything they touched.
